manabridge.info.title: === Mana Bridge ===
config.manabridge.k_ars.desc: Multiplier for Ars Nouveau mana in max mana formula
config.manabridge.k_irons.desc: Multiplier for Iron's Spells mana in max mana formula
config.manabridge.n_value.desc: Number subtracted from total max mana
config.manabridge.max_mana_cap.desc: Hard cap for total mana (0 = unlimited)
config.manabridge.batch_update.desc: Update mana less frequently for optimization
Only sync when mana actually changes
